author: bwya77
description: Automatically adjusts tab header widths to fit each tab's title content.

manifest.author: Bradley Wyatt
manifest.description: Automatically adjusts tab header widths in real-time to perfectly fit each tab's title content while maintaining a clean, seamless interface that prevents awkward text truncation and ensures optimal readability of your document titles.
manifest.name: Autofit Tabs

releases.author: bwya77
releases.description:
#### Added
- New feature to nicely close tabs by shrinking. Closes #9

releases.author: bwya77
releases.description:
# Added
- Setting (enabled by default) to not theme tabs that are web links (web viewer)

releases.author: bwya77
releases.description:
# Fixed
- Tabs were not rending as a single element using the Baseline theme 
- Close button padding wasn't properly working when taking the tab size into consideration 

# Added
- Hide the icons in tabs
- Ignore formatting tabs that are pinned

# Changed
- Improved the animation of grow/shrink
- Changed default settings 
- Improved the settings grouping and layout

releases.author: bwya77
releases.description:
# Changelog

## [1.0.5] - 2025-04-06

### Fixed
- Fixed an issue where off-screen tabs interfered with dragging the Obsidian window. Tabs that are scrolled out of view (behind the left workspace panel or off-screen to the right) now properly disable pointer events when not visible.

### Added
- Added new visibility management system for tabs that are scrolled out of view
- Tabs that are not in the visible area now get an "out-of-view" class that disables pointer events
- Added scroll event listeners to update tab visibility states in real-time
- Added periodic visibility checks to ensure consistent behavior

### Changed
- Improved tab container structure to ensure proper stacking of UI elements
- Enhanced z-index handling for the workspace header area to maintain proper draggable areas
- Optimized tab cleanup and reset processes to handle visibility classes

releases.author: bwya77
releases.description:
# Fixed
- When setting the icon padding to 0 and hovering over a tab, the title would appear to 'jitter' as the text would shift left to make space for the X icon.

releases.author: bwya77
releases.description:
# Added
- Scrolling Tab Bars: Enables tabs to be scrolled left and right when they exceed the available space
- Auto Center Tabs:  When clicking a tab that is off-screen, the tab will automatically scroll into view
- Max Tab Width: Sets the max tab width, if a title exceeds the length it will be truncated with (...), default is 0 which is disabled 

# Fixed
- Performance issues to the left file/folder pane when expanding and collapsing folders

# Changed
- Set the default Close button padding to 0
